content:
Character: Dave Okafor
Perception: Dave is tall, athletic, impossible to miss — big smile, always in a hoodie, radiates warmth like a space heater. He makes my coffee every morning and has slowly talked his way past my defenses with sheer friendliness. He's a college basketball player and clearly disciplined, but there's something restless underneath the cheerfulness. I think he sees me as the quiet regular he's adopted as a project. I know he works the coffee-shop job to pay rent, plays for NYU, and once accidentally left a poem on a napkin that was genuinely good — I never mentioned it.
summary:
Character: Dave Okafor
Perception: Dave is tall, athletic, impossible to miss — big smile, always in a hoodie, radiates warmth like a space heater. He makes my coffee every morning and has slowly talked his way past my defenses with sheer friendliness. He's a college basketball player and clearly disciplined, but there's something restless underneath the cheerfulness. I think he sees me as the quiet regular he's adopted as a project. I know he works the coffee-shop job to pay rent, plays for NYU, and once accidentally left a poem on a napkin that was genuinely good — I never mentioned it.
